features.name: unpacked struct elaboration parameter
features.description: Code should include an unpacked struct type used as the type of a localparam that is assigned from a function call

features.name: function returning unpacked struct in constant expression
features.description: Code should include a function that returns an unpacked struct type, used to initialize a localparam

features.name: unpacked struct with nested packed struct in parameter
features.description: Code should include an unpacked struct containing a nested packed struct, used as a localparam type for elaboration
